This fictional procurement packet supports OPTBOT Atlanta Office Refresh - Three Site Modernization. It references quote Q-DEV-ATL-047-R3, mock PO PO-MOCK-77421, and mock MSA
The packet is designed to test parser recognition of approvals, payment terms, procurement controls, line-item rationale, signature blocks, and checklist actions.

Current rooms use inconsistent camera, microphone, calendar, and scheduling-panel setups, causing meeting delays and uneven user experience. Desk-accessory standards vary by floor and site, creating support complexity and asset tracking gaps. The refresh standardizes collaboration spaces, improves wireless and warehouse device reliability, upgrades network closets, and creates a cleaner asset baseline for future service operations.
